product.title: Dog Car Seat Cover, 600D Heavy Dute Durable Car Seat Cover for Dogs Pets, 100% Waterproof Scratch Proof Nonslip Dog Hammock for Cars, Seat Covers Protector with Seatbelt for Pet Sedan SUV Trucks

attributes.name: Special Feature
attributes.value: Waterproof & Scratch-Resistant Material, Breathable Mesh Window, Multiple Stability Accessories, Easy Cleaning, Versatile Installation Methods

feature_bullets: Superior Material ：Crafted from premium 600D Oxford cloth and waterproof TPU, our dog rear car seat for medium dogs boasts exceptional waterproof and scratch-resistant properties. No liquid or pesky scratches will penetrate this top-notch cover, ensuring your car seat remains pristine.

Mesh Window & Storage Bag：Prioritizing your pet's comfort, our back seat cover for dogs comes with a breathable and transparent mesh window that allows you and your furry friend to see and hear each other, alleviating any stress or anxiety. The added storage bag provides ample space to store your pet's essentials.

Reinforced Stability ：We understand the importance of stability, which is why we've added multiple accessories for reinforced stability. The PVE nonslip underside keeps the dog car rear seat cover securely in place, while our side flap metal buckles, seal zipper, seat anchors, seat snap buckles, and Velcro opening for safety belts ensure maximum stability and safety for your pet.

Easy to Clean ：The dog accessories for large dogs for car is a breeze to clean with its durable and versatile material, making it effortless to remove any mud, dust, or liquid spills, using a machine wash, hand wash, or vacuum cleaner. Say goodbye to the hassle of cleaning your car seat cover.

Easy to Install & Remove：Setting up our travel dog back seat cover is a breeze thanks to its straightforward structure. Simply watch our video, and you'll have all the parts assembled in no time. Plus, with different installation methods, such as Hammock Mode, Truck Mode, and Seat Mode, you can customize the cover to your needs and preferences. Hit the road with ease and confidence.

local.title: very nice car seat cover for dogs
local.text: This is a very well made, & well designed car seat cover. The construction is sturdy, it covers the entire seat, and is designed to contain dog hair rather than allow it to fall onto the seat or floor. It fits my older Honda Civic perfectly.The openings with velcro for access to seat belts are a nice feature, however, my Kong brand tether system is at the center of the seat, halfway up the seat, so I had to slit the fabric to access it. I took out the rear headrests for better vision, but the cover anchors nicely to the child-seat anchors at the top of the seat. My door handles don't permit the end panel supports to anchor there, however the vertical supports for my dog barrier support the straps to the front ring, which holds the end nicely. The frond seat headrest could also anchor these. I think this seat cover is well worth the price.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

local.title: Helped my car-sick pup!
local.text: My little one had (had?) terrible car sickness. Since we’ve started using this, no issues. I wouldn’t say this was the cure but I will say it absolutely contributed to his ability to relax!! Also super easy to install and remove (I do it all the time), keeps the car clean and is waterproof. Also easy to wipe down. Fits perfectly in my Kia Seltos. Highly recommend. Good quality all around (zippers, material, etc).
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 30, 2026

local.title: 10/10 love this dog taco.
local.text: This is a fantastic dog taco. It is good quality fabric and zippers. There is a small mesh window where the dog can look forward. The ends closest to the doors also zip up to keep the dog contained and away from the gap between the seat and door. 10/10. This fit well in my 2022 Tacoma without any effort to set it up.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 2, 2026

local.title: Terrific support from the seller. Great quality with an exception.
local.text: This is a very nice pet hammock for the price. I noticed the material is thick and appears quite durable. It was very simple to install, and there are many configurations available [SUV cargo area, back seat, front seat]. I had a problem with one of the zippers - it broke on second use, but the seller was easy to contact, and immediately sent me a replacement. I think the zippers are the weak links in the product, so I intend to be very gently with them - though I don't expect them to last. I can live without zipping up the door ends of the hammock, as my dog is not one to damage the door panels. I also intend to find a non-slip pad to put under my dog as the material does not really keep her from slipping a bit on curves. It's not slick, but she hasn't any texture to keep her from sliding. I'll use her harness and seatbelt for longer trips.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 24, 2025

local.title: Must-Have for Dog Parents
local.text: This 600D Heavy-Duty Dog Car Seat Cover is exactly what every dog lover needs. It’s durable, well-made, and fits securely across the back seat with full coverage. The quilted fabric protects seats from fur, dirt, and scratches, while still being comfortable enough for dogs to relax and nap. The mesh window is a standout feature - great airflow and visibility so pets feel calm and connected during the ride. Installation is quick, it stays in place, and cleanup is easy (shake, wipe, or wash). ✔️ Strong, thick material✔️ Full back-seat protection✔️ Breathable mesh for comfort✔️ Easy to clean & looks sleek If you drive with your dog even occasionally, this is a smart, practical buy that keeps your car clean and your pup happy. Highly recommend 🐾🚗
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 16, 2026

local.title: Fantastic Seat cover!!!!
local.text: I purchased this seat cover expecting to be flimsy and not to keep up with my 'Belgium Mallinois', but I was wrong!. I required to bring my dog and the dog of a friend of mine for a 10-hour drive this past weekend. And this product proved to be the best car set cover for dogs that I have tried ever! It is not flimsy, it is easy to vacuum, it is sturdy, and perfect size. It standed my dog pacing back and forth. Both dogs were shedding so you can picture that there was hair everywhere in the hammock, but NOT in the car seats or minimum hair everywhere else in the car and very easy to vacuum, meanwhile this hammock ended being a carpet of dog hair!, lol, after we returned home I took my vacuum (a cordless Eureka Vacuum that I also purchased on Amazon) put the small vacuum tube nozzle and started getting the hair out which came out easily, less than 1 hour and it was 99% hair free. Then, I took some lysol wipes and fully scrubbed it (while it still set in the car). I did 3 clean-passes with lysol wipes all over the hammock and a thorough vaccumming and it is brand new!. LOVE IT! I did not take pictures of befoe and after but if you read this, this is a great cover seat for any Grand Cherokee Jeep. The standard size fit perfectly. The zippers on both ends are durable, my only point is that the side handles should have other side wraps to tie the lateral sides up to the hanger of the car, specially useful for cars that only have little hooks and not lateral-rings on the roof/ lateral sides of the car. I did not read instructions but is fairly easy to get ahold of it and how to put it. The fabric is waterproof, sturdy and goes in contact with the dogs and the bottom side has some sort of rubber texture and goes on top of the car seats. There a couple of handles that go in inside the adjoining part of the seat and back-rest of the car which prevents the hammock from moving and top straps for the head rest. I did not use the lateral cords/straps because my Grand Cherokee Jeep has hooks on the lateral side not hand-rings and the straps are meant for hand-rings on the upper lateral sides of a car. I guess I could have used some bunge cord to attach to the straps or to the lateral rings of the hammock and from thee to tie around the head rest of the back or front seats and problem solved, but I did not, regardless it worked fantastic, the lateral sides kept up no problem. May be the manufacturer could consider a combination of bogey straps and regular straps to secure the lateral sides to other parts of the car when no top-lateral-ring-handles are available, but even so, it was not that inconvenient. It is a very sturdy and easy to clean product. There is a section with a see thru fabric that kept the dogs watching us and at ease during the trip. Both dogs a couple of times tried to jump over to get to us, we pushed them back and the zipper of the see-thru fabric kept in place without opening... wow! really good!. Lateral Zippers are really good as well. In the picture you can see the corners of one front-seat where both dogs tried to move over to us, after a couple of tryouts and after being stopped with the command to stay in the hammock, they stopped trying, lol. I am really impressed with this product. Very good fabric, easy to clean, stays in place, good stitching. It is indeed very good!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on September 22, 2025

local.title: Protect your back seat from muddy dogs
local.text: This is a good backseat cover for my dog to sit on. It also has a safety strap to hook on the dog’s harness. It’s washable & seems very durable. I’ve had it a few months. I like the pockets to put your items in. A really good buy!!

local.title: good price, easy to take off and on, looks nice
local.text: Bought this so the new puppy would mess up the back seats of my Mach-e. Fits very good and is high quality material that doesn’t let water seam through and can be put on and taken off quite quickly. Love that i can use the dogs seat belt harness clamp with it. The look is quite classy and doesn’t look cheap. Been using for a few months now and have no complaints.

global.title: Easy to clean.
global.text: Was helpful for us because on our last ride, one of our boys vomited and it was easy to clean. I have a small hatch and it is a bit big. But manageable. We will probably use it in our larger sedan as well as well so not too much of a worry.

global.title: Great quality
global.text: Really pleased with the design and quality of this car seat. The side zips help keep the floors clean. Would recommend.

global.title: a must have for your car
global.text: Excellent Product, quality material, fits the backseat well. One issue - the side zips at the window end slip off easily when my dog stands at the window. Wish I had bought it sooner.
